title: TchicX Modpack
description: A personal collection of mods and my personally used settings for the respective mods.
body:
# TchicX Vanilla-Friendly Modpack
A personal collection of mods, resource packs, and configurations optimized for enhancing gameplay while remaining true to the vanilla experience. This modpack includes optimization mods, my custom resource pack, and tailored settings for various mods. Additionally, I've incorporated QoL features that enhance my personal gameplay experience.

## Credits
- Base optimizations was adopted from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop).
- Inspiration from [barces vanilla experience](https://modrinth.com/modpack/barces-vanilla-experience).
- Included resourcepack is [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX).
- Included shaderpacks is
  - [Complementary Shaders - Unbound r5.1.1](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) by [EminGT](https://modrinth.com/user/EminGT)

## Version Explanation
```
TchicX Modpack <Modpack Version> - <Minecraft Version the modpack is built on>
```

Under <Modpack Version> this is the meaning:
- The first number, e.g., **2**.x, indicates major updates, aligning with Minecraft releases.
- The second number, e.g., x.**1**, denotes minor updates such as additions, replacements, or updates to a single mod.
